name: MSI PRO B550M-VC WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR4-4400(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - 2x USB 3.2 Gen 2 10Gbps Type-A - VGA - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Gigabit LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E (B550MPROVCWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO B550M-VC WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - 1x PCIe
description: Compact AMD AM4 Micro-ATX motherboard with B550 chipset, Wi-Fi 6E, and DDR4 support for small form factor builds.
